risks: No monitoring or diagnostics resources included — no Log Analytics workspace, Application Insights, or diagnostic settings for any resource
SQL MI General Purpose tier with zoneRedundant: false limits database-tier high availability to single-zone
No autoscale configuration for the application tier VMSS (vmss-app-prod-001), only the web tier has autoscale
Presentation tier uses L4 Load Balancer only — no WAF, SSL offload, or URL-based routing protection
App tier VMSS (vmss-app-prod-001) is not explicitly linked to the internal LB (lbi-app-prod-001) backend pool in its network profile
No explicit RBAC role assignment resource granting the managed identity (id-sqlmi-prod-001) access to Key Vault for TDE CMK operations
correctionsRecommended: Add a Log Analytics workspace and configure diagnostic settings on NSGs, Load Balancers, VMSS, Key Vault, and SQL MI for operational visibility
Add an autoscale setting resource (Microsoft.Insights/autoscaleSettings) targeting vmss-app-prod-001 for elastic application tier scaling
Add vmss-app-prod-001 network profile reference to lbi-app-prod-001 backend pool and add lbi-app-prod-001 to vmss-app-prod-001 dependencies
Add a Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments resource granting id-sqlmi-prod-001 the Key Vault Crypto Service Encryption User role on kv-threetier-prod-001
Consider replacing the external Standard LB with an Application Gateway or adding Azure Front Door for L7 features and WAF on the presentation tier
Add a resource tagging strategy (environment, cost-center, workload) across all resources for operational management and cost tracking
